She is still under their sur
veillance.


This has taken place here in the
City Beautiful and within the last
few weeks. Yet the cause of the
Young Women's Christian associa-
ton is known but to hundreds.


Brilliant young women, both
married and single, have given up
their lives to work in the interest
and for the good of the unfortunate
young people of their sex. Their
days are almost endless and their
work is going on always as long
as there is something that can be
done for the betterment of social
conditions and as long as there is
q chance to make some sad young
girl happy. Rescues from the
worlds elements and evils are
daily occurrences to these young
women. yet they get little of the
consideration that seems due to
them.


The deaf and dumb. the sick,
homeless, penniless and the friend
less, who think they have little for
which to live, are picked up, given
food, made comfortable and have
their needs attended to by the SEQ
retaries OF the Y. w. G. A. In Spo-
kane, but so far 1t has all been
done so quietly that the public.
aside from those who have bene-
fitted by their efforts, have been
unaware OF any of Il,
